x-enumeration-literals.name: Debit Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to post a debit entry to an account, reducing its balance or increasing an asset/expense.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Credit Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to post a credit entry to an account, increasing its balance or recognizing income/liability.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to reverse a previously posted entry to correct errors or cancel transactions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to modify posted entries due to corrections, recalculations, or reconciliations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accrual Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to post accrued income, interest, or expenses into the ledger.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to post entries that finalize the transfer of funds or assets between parties.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Transfer Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to post movements between accounts within the same institution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to automatically post entries at predefined intervals.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to post entries only when certain predefined conditions are met.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cross-Border Posting Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to post entries involving currency conversion or multiple jurisdictions.
